---
title: "W05-classnotes"
author: "Thomas Prata"
date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-expand: true
    number-sections: true
    code-link: true
    embed-resources: true
    theme: flatly
    code-fold: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-tools: true
editor: visual
execute:
  freeze: auto
---

# class Overview

# Assignment deadline overview

# Appendix

-   My webpage for this work :
